descriptionZh: 矿石加工生产线首道工序设备，处理能力15-217 m³/h。采用高强度板式结构，可靠输送大块矿石，保证均匀给料，提高生产效率。适用于矿山、砂石、水泥等行业。
descriptionEn: Primary equipment in ore processing lines with 15-217 m³/h capacity. Features high-strength plate structure for reliable transport of large materials, ensuring uniform feeding and improved production efficiency. Ideal for mining, aggregate, and cement industries.

features.descriptionZh: 高强钢板结构，耐冲击耐磨损，在恶劣工况下稳定运行
features.descriptionEn: High-strength steel plate structure, impact and wear resistant, stable operation in harsh conditions

features.descriptionZh: 0.025-1.5 m/s可调速度，保证物料输送均匀稳定
features.descriptionEn: Adjustable speed (0.025-1.5 m/s) ensures uniform and stable material transfer

features.descriptionZh: 模块化设计，关键部件易拆装，减少停机时间
features.descriptionEn: Modular design with easily replaceable key components, minimizing downtime

features.descriptionZh: 7.5kW高效电机，优化传动系统降低能耗
features.descriptionEn: 7.5kW efficient motor with optimized transmission system for lower energy consumption

features.descriptionZh: 多规格选择(宽度800-1200mm)，适应各种物料特性
features.descriptionEn: Multiple specifications (width 800-1200mm) to accommodate various material characteristics

description.zh: 为铁矿、铜矿等破碎站提供均匀给料，特别适合大块高硬度矿石，防止堵塞，提高生产稳定性。处理能力最高可达217 m³/h，板式结构可承受大块矿石冲击。
description.en: Provides uniform feeding for crushing stations in iron and copper mines. Ideal for large, high-hardness ores, preventing blockages and enhancing production stability. Maximum capacity reaches 217 m³/h with plate structure designed to withstand impact of large ores.

description.zh: 作为砂石生产线初级给料设备，将料仓物料均匀给入破碎机。适应湿润黏性物料，减少给料波动，最低处理量15 m³/h，确保生产线连续稳定运行。
description.en: Serves as primary feeding equipment in aggregate production, transferring materials from hoppers to crushers. Handles wet and sticky materials with minimal feeding fluctuations. Minimum capacity of 15 m³/h ensures continuous stable operation of production lines.

description.zh: 为水泥生产提供石灰石、黏土等原料的稳定给料。耐磨板式设计支持连续作业，宽度选择800-1200mm满足不同产量需求，适合长时间无间断运行。
description.en: Delivers stable feeding of limestone and clay for cement production. Wear-resistant plate design supports continuous operation with width options of 800-1200mm for various output requirements, suitable for long-term uninterrupted operation.

description.zh: 为钢铁、有色金属冶炼提供均匀给料。特殊板式结构耐高温，确保持续稳定供料，设备重量3500-5000kg保证重载工况下的稳定性和可靠性。
description.en: Provides uniform feeding for steel and non-ferrous metal smelting. Special plate structure withstands high temperatures, ensuring continuous stable material supply. Equipment weight of 3500-5000kg guarantees stability and reliability under heavy-duty conditions.
